---
title: "Links"
description: "A collection of links to institutional affiliations, academic communities, and collaborators."
page-layout: full
css: assets/css/links.css
---

::: {.links-page}

## Affiliations

::: {.links-grid}

::: {.link-card}
### Central European University

Current doctoral affiliation.

::: {.link-list}
[University](https://www.ceu.edu/)  
[Department of Network and Data Science](https://networkdatascience.ceu.edu/)
:::
:::

::: {.link-card}
### Queen Mary University of London

MSc affiliation.

::: {.link-list}
[University](https://www.qmul.ac.uk/)  
[School of Mathematical Sciences](https://www.qmul.ac.uk/maths/)
:::
:::

::: {.link-card}
### Hokkaido University

Undergraduate affiliation.

::: {.link-list}
[University](https://www.global.hokudai.ac.jp/)  
[Division of Applied Physics](https://applphys.net/diven/)  
[Laboratory of Condensed Matter Physics](https://subutu-ap.eng.hokudai.ac.jp/index.html)
:::
:::

:::

## Communities

::: {.links-grid}

::: {.link-card}
### Network science and complex systems

::: {.link-list}
[Network Science Society](https://www.netscisociety.net/home)  
[ネットワーク科学研究会](https://www.network-science-seminar.com/)  
[ネットワーク科学勉強会](https://sites.google.com/view/networkpaperreading/)
:::
:::

::: {.link-card}
### Physics societies

::: {.link-list}
[American Physical Society](https://www.aps.org/)  
[Austrian Physical Society](https://oepg.at/en)  
[日本物理学会](https://www.jps.or.jp/)
:::
:::

::: {.link-card}
### Japanese researcher communities

::: {.link-list}
[ドイツ物理学・応用物理学セミナー](https://sites.google.com/site/jpsingermany/home)  
[Japanese-Austrian Researcher Network](https://jpn-aut-research.github.io/)
:::
:::

:::

## Mentors and collaborators

::: {.person-grid}

- [Kousuke Yakubo](https://researchmap.jp/read0166630?lang=en)
- [Ginestra Bianconi](https://www.qmul.ac.uk/maths/profiles/bianconig.html)
- [Márton Pósfai](https://networkdatascience.ceu.edu/people/marton-posfai)
- [János Kertész](https://networkdatascience.ceu.edu/people/janos-kertesz)
- [Albert-László Barabási](https://barabasi.com/)
- [Johan Åkerman](http://www.akermanlab.com/)
- [Shogo Mizutaka](https://mizutaka.cis.ibaraki.ac.jp/)
- [Takehisa Hasegawa](https://takehisahasegawa.sci.ibaraki.ac.jp/)

:::

:::
